name: Contrario
long_description: Contrario is an agentic recruiting platform that helps companies hire faster by enabling expert recruiters with AI agents that run their workflows. Receive high-quality profiles directly in Slack and run your entire hiring process through simple natural language commands. Agents and recruiters work together to handle sourcing, screening, scheduling, and closing candidates. As your team makes decisions, our system learns your unique hiring bar and surfaces better talent over time.
one_liner: The agentic layer for hiring, backed by expert recruiters
